name: Goodreads: Similar Books (Recommendations)
summary: Given a Goodreads book, return the full 'Readers also enjoyed' recommendation list with title, author, average rating, ratings count, and URL.
description: Opens a book page, resolves its /book/similar/<work_id> link, fetches that server-rendered recommendation page same-origin, and parses the .responsiveBook entries into a clean recommendation list. This is the read-only proxy for Goodreads recommendations seeded from a book you like (personalized account recommendations require login). Feed any book_url back into goodreads/book for details.

book_url.description: Full Goodreads book URL whose recommendations you want, e.g. https://www.goodreads.com/book/show/29993569-raising-a-secure-child. Query strings and #anchors are ignored.

steps.name: Navigate to the seed book page
Wait for book chrome / similar link

inputs.script: const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const origin=location.origin;const cleanPath=(h)=>{const m=(h||'').match(/\/book\/show\/[^?#]+/);return m?m[0]:'';};const seedPath=cleanPath(location.pathname);const seedTitle=norm(document.querySelector(`h1[data-testid='bookTitle']`)?.textContent)||norm(document.querySelector('h1')?.textContent);const simHref=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(`a[href*='/book/similar/']`)).map(a=>a.getAttribute('href')).find(Boolean);let result;if(!simHref){result={seed_title:seedTitle||'N/A',similar_url:'N/A',count:0,recommendations:[]};}else{const simUrl=simHref.startsWith('http')?simHref:origin+simHref;const res=await fetch(simUrl,{credentials:'same-origin'});const html=await res.text();const doc=new DOMParser().parseFromString(html,'text/html');const items=Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('.responsiveBook'));const out=[];const seen=new Set();for(const it of items){const a=it.querySelector(`a[href*='/book/show/']`);if(!a)continue;const p=cleanPath(a.getAttribute('href'));if(!p||p===seedPath||seen.has(p))continue;const img=it.querySelector('img');const title=(img?norm(img.getAttribute('alt')):'')||'';const author=norm(it.querySelector(`a[href*='/author/show/']`)?.textContent);const t=norm(it.textContent);const rm=t.match(/([0-9.]+)\s*avg\.?\s*rating/i);const cm=t.match(/avg\.?\s*rating[^0-9]*([0-9.,k]+)\s*ratings?/i);seen.add(p);out.push({title:title||'N/A',author:author||'N/A',avg_rating:rm?rm[1]:'N/A',ratings_count:cm?cm[1].replace(/,/g,''):'N/A',book_url:origin+p});}result={seed_title:seedTitle||'N/A',similar_url:simUrl.replace(/[?#].*$/,''),count:out.length,recommendations:out};}return result;

steps.name: Resolve and parse the similar-books page

help.summary: Full 'Readers also enjoyed' recommendation list for a Goodreads book.

parameters.book_url: Full Goodreads /book/show/ URL to seed recommendations from.

examples.description: Get recommendations seeded from a book

returns: Object: { seed_title, similar_url, count, recommendations: [{ title, author, avg_rating, ratings_count, book_url }] }.
notes: Reads the book page, then fetches its /book/similar/<work_id> page (server-rendered) and parses .responsiveBook entries.
This is the seeded-by-a-book recommendation surface; account-personalized recommendations on /recommendations require a logged-in Goodreads session and are not covered here.
ratings_count may be a compact form like '47.1k' as Goodreads renders it on the similar page.
